rxn_class_summary: Electrochemical radical cascade trifluoromethylation/sulfonylation-cyclization of N-allylamides with CF3SO2Na or arylsulfonyl hydrazines to access trifluoromethylated or sulfonylated 4,5-dihydrooxazoles.
electrochemical_role: Anodic single-electron oxidation of CF3SO2- to CF3SO2 radical (which loses SO2 to give CF3 radical); subsequent second anodic SET oxidizes the alkyl radical intermediate I to cation II. At the cathode, water is reduced to H2 and OH-.

key_intermediates.name: CF3SO2 radical (from anodic oxidation of triflinate)
Carbon-centered radical I (CF3 addition adduct to allylamide alkene)
Benzylic/tertiary carbocation II (after second anodic SET)
Dihydrooxazole 3a (product after intramolecular O-cyclization and deprotonation)

electron_flow: Anode oxidizes CF3SO2- to CF3SO2 radical, which loses SO2 to give CF3 radical; CF3 radical adds regioselectively to the alkene of the N-allylamide to form C-radical I, which is oxidized at the anode a second time to carbocation II; K2CO3-assisted intramolecular attack of the amide oxygen on II with loss of H+ delivers the dihydrooxazole 3a. The cathode reduces water to H2 and hydroxide.

probe_reagents.name: 1,1-diphenylethylene (DPE)
probe_reagents.observation: With CF3SO2Na: 3a only trace, CF3-DPE-OH adduct 6 detected by GC-MS. With sulfonyl source 4a: 5a 18%, Ts-DPE adduct 8 detected by GC-MS; confirms CF3 and sulfonyl radicals.

probe_reagents.name: BHT
probe_reagents.observation: With 2a: 3a yield reduced to 23%, BHT-CF3 adduct 7 detected by GC-MS. With 4a: 5a 25%, BHT-Ts adduct 9 detected; supports radical pathway.

probe_reagents.name: Cyclic voltammetry of 1a, 2a, 4a
probe_reagents.observation: E_ox(2a) = 1.16 V and E_ox(4a) = 1.33 V vs SCE, both lower than E_ox(1a) = 1.89–1.90 V vs SCE, indicating triflinate/sulfinate is oxidized first at the anode.

probe_reagents.name: No-electricity control (entry 15)
probe_reagents.observation: No reaction without applied current, confirming electrochemical initiation.

notes: Mechanism is supported by radical trapping with BHT and DPE plus CV showing preferential oxidation of the sulfinate/triflinate over the N-allylamide. No DFT or KIE studies were performed. The cyclization step (II → 3a) is depicted as a polar intramolecular electrophilic O-cyclization promoted by K2CO3.
